ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., autoencoder, CNN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the hyperparameter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "training_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training run */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training run (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the training run */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the training run */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Total time taken to complete the training run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "training_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., loss, validation loss) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the performance metric */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_training_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("training_run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment version was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the result was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment or model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the experiment or model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collaboration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
